name: Miniature Quiches
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup red or green bell pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Sauté the chopped bell pepper and scallions in a hot skillet until tender.
3. Beat all the eggs slightly.
4. Stir in the sautéed vegetables with the beaten eggs, then add all remaining ingredients.
5. Spoon 1 tablespoon of mixture into small muffin tins (about 3/4 x 1 inch cups).
6. Bake until the centers are set, about 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for a minute before removing from the tin.
8. Serve hot or warm. Makes around 20 miniature quiches (a bite full).
